resources.string: Please fill in the mandatory fields
Sorry, we couldn\'t reach the database. Please try again later.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam hendrerit eros in quam aliquam, eget sollicitudin enim faucibus. Sed pellentesque luctus nulla eget aliquet. Aenean volutpat ut nisl blandit aliquet. Integer porta tincidunt tincidunt. Ut eleifend, neque a vestibulum finibus, tortor elit pharetra felis, ac pulvinar quam lectus et justo. Ut imperdiet tortor ut pharetra gravida. Vivamus at rutrum leo. Morbi metus nisl, egestas non mi sed, eleifend euismod nulla.
Info button about the selection process

When you sign up, your name gets put into a pool, then the organizer can randomly select people to invite.\n\nIf you get invited, you can choose to accept or decline. If you don\'t accept by the deadline, you are automatically declined.
Default Event Name (you shouldn\'t see this)
Every Thursday and Friday @ 2:30 p.m. – 5:00 p.m. from 2026-03-05 – 2026-04-24 (you shouldn\'t see this)
put on by Aurora LLC (you shouldn\'t see this)
in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada (you shouldn\'t see this)
Sign up before 2:30 p.m. on 2026-02-26 (you shouldn\'t see this)
67 people are waiting (you shouldn\'t see this)
10/32 people are participating (you shouldn\'t see this)
This action is permanent. Do you wish to proceed?
